title: Container Image Scanner — Trivy/Grype Live Integration & Layer Secret Detection
description: container_scanner.py scans Docker/OCI images and Dockerfiles for vulnerable base images, Dockerfile misconfigurations, layer secrets, and Helm chart security. test_file_size_limits.py clusters here confirming file size and filename sanitization. Gap: Trivy/Grype integration is conditional on binary availability — if not present, the scanner returns empty results rather than falling back to its built-in checks.
missing: Built-in fallback scanner: when Trivy/Grype is absent, execute the built-in Dockerfile pattern checker and layer secret regex scanner unconditionally
Trivy SBOM output: run trivy with --format cyclonedx and feed the output into sbom_export_engine for unified SBOM management
Helm chart secrets detection: scan Helm values.yaml and templates for hardcoded secrets using the same regex patterns as real_scanner
